phases.title: Dispatch Queue & Orchestrator

tasks.title: Complete DispatchQueue contract (src/server/dispatch.ts)
tasks.description:
Add missing contract methods per contracts/dispatch.md:

1. Add `handleCompletion(dispatchId: string, exitCode: number, stderr: string): Promise<void>`
   - If exitCode === 0: set status "completed", call finishRun()
   - If exitCode !== 0 AND attempts < 3: set status "retrying", re-queue
   - If exitCode !== 0 AND attempts >= 3: escalate to next backend in fallbackOrder
   - If all backends exhausted: set status "failed"
2. Rename existing `getStatus()` to `getQueue()`, return `{ active, queued, throttled: this.monitor.isThrottled() }`
3. Add `getDispatch(featureId: string, phaseId: string): DispatchRecord | null` — search active + queued + history
4. Add `runId?: number` to DispatchAttempt in src/server/types.ts
5. In handleCompletion, call `finishRun(attempt.runId, ...)` from src/db/runs.ts

The existing setTimeout stub in runDispatch is acceptable for Phase 05 scope — mark with TODO comment for Phase 06.

Acceptance: T027-gate.sh passes (asserts all 5 contract methods + finishRun + pnpm build)

REVIEW FAIL (code): Lint Errors — noNonNullAssertion and noExplicitAny.
  WHERE: src/server/dispatch.ts:62,120
  EXPECTED: No lint errors.
  ACTUAL: Forbidden non-null assertion on queue.shift() and explicit any on catch(e).
  FIX: Replace ! with if-check and use instanceof Error or String(e) for catch block.
  GATE: gates/T027-gate.sh
  REF: plan.md Phase 5 > src/server/dispatch.ts

tasks.title: Add tests for new DispatchQueue methods (src/server/dispatch.test.ts)
tasks.description:
Add test cases for the methods added in T027:

1. handleCompletion() with exitCode 0 → record.status === "completed"
2. handleCompletion() with exitCode 1, attempt < 3 → record.status === "retrying", record re-queued
3. handleCompletion() with exitCode 1, attempt >= 3 → backend escalation or status "failed"
4. getQueue() returns { active: [], queued: [], throttled: boolean }
5. getDispatch(featureId, phaseId) returns correct record or null

Existing 3 tests (enqueue, processNext throttled, processNext unthrottled) must continue to pass.

Acceptance: `pnpm vitest run src/server/dispatch.test.ts` exits 0 with >= 6 tests

REVIEW FAIL (code): Lint Errors — noExplicitAny.
  WHERE: src/server/dispatch.test.ts:26,27,28,43,44,45
  EXPECTED: No explicit any types in tests.
  ACTUAL: mockMonitor, mockSandbox, and mockGit are typed as any.
  FIX: Use proper mock types (vi.Mocked<T>) or omit explicit any.
  GATE: gates/T030-gate.sh
  REF: plan.md Phase 5 > src/server/dispatch.test.ts

No code changes expected — this task verifies T027 did not introduce regressions.

3. `pnpm vitest run src/server/integration.test.ts` — must pass (fix assertion if needed: dispatch POST may return 200, 201, or 400)
